Michael Thompson
Columbus, OH

Summary
Dedicated and safety-conscious CDL-A Driver with over 3 years of over-the-road (OTR) experience. Proven track record of on-time deliveries and excellent customer service. Committed to maintaining a clean driving record and adhering to all DOT regulations. Seeking to leverage driving skills and experience to contribute to a reputable transportation company.

Experience

ABC Freight Lines, Columbus, OH  
CDL-A Driver  
January 2020 – Present  
- Successfully completed over 150,000 miles of OTR driving with a focus on timely delivery and customer satisfaction.  
- Maintained a clean MVR with no DUIs or accidents in the last 7 years.  
- Conducted pre-trip and post-trip inspections to ensure compliance with safety regulations.  
- Communicated effectively with dispatch and customers regarding delivery schedules and special requests.

XYZ Logistics, Columbus, OH  
Regional Driver  
June 2018 – December 2019  
- Delivered freight across the Midwest region, averaging 2,500 miles per week.  
- Developed strong relationships with clients through reliable service and open communication.  
- Ensured timely completion of all paperwork, including bills of lading and inspection reports.  
- Participated in company safety programs and achieved recognition for maintaining an accident-free record.

Certifications  
- Class A Commercial Driver’s License (CDL)  
- DOT Medical Card  

Skills  
- Excellent navigational skills and knowledge of DOT regulations  
- Strong time management and organizational abilities  
- Proficient in using electronic logging devices (ELDs)  
- Ability to lift up to 75 pounds and perform physical tasks as required  

Education  
Columbus Community College, Columbus, OH  
Certificate in Commercial Truck Driving  
Graduated May 2018
